calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Oct-30-2019 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Richard Ellis Robinson, Deputy City Attorney, 415-554-3800 for Defendant.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction.

Plaintiff and Petitioner SN Sands Corporation, dba S & S Trucking's application for a preliminary injunction is denied.

Petitioner provided certain biosolids and grit hauling services to Defendant and Respondent City and County of San Francisco under a contract that, as extended, expired on September 30, 2019. (Magante Decl. 2, 18 & Ex. L.) In April 2019, a replacement contract for the same services was the subject of an Invitation for Bids issued by the City. (Id. 2.) Although Petitioner submitted a bid, a competitor, Denali Water Solutions, was the low bidder for Aggregate 1, and accordingly on June 12, 2019, the City issued a notice of intent to award that portion of the contract to Denali. (Id. 9 & Ex. F.) (Petitioner apparently was awarded another portion of the contract, for Aggregate 2.) Petitioner's subsequent bid protest was rejected by the City on July 15, 2019. (Id. 11-13 & Exs. G-I.) On September 25, 2019, the City issued a contract to Denali, which signed it on September 26, 2019. (Id. 14 & Ex. J.) On September 27, 2019, the Court denied Petitioner's request for a TRO and set a hearing on an OSC re preliminary injunction.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
